     the Fermi energy is     2.3049 ev

!    total energy              =   -8074.67047466 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.4E-10 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.27317058 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -8074.39730408 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -207058.85905940 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  104395.89339461 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -3118.68290939 Ry
     ewald contribution        =   97709.16179604 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.91052594 Ry

     total magnetization       =    33.35 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    36.37 Bohr mag/cell
